evidence: standards/enterprise/performance-resilience.md and the final joined AI consistency review
exception_policy: A frame-budget exception records the exact interaction, supported devices, measured hitches/stalls, user impact, owner, expiry, and remediation plan.
statement: Critical rendering and interaction journeys MUST have product-owned frame or hitch thresholds and MUST keep expensive parsing, I/O, decoding, and computation out of rendering and main-actor paths.
